case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Currencyservice latency.p90 dev=+2.1, recommendationservice latency.p90 dev=+2.6, productcatalogservice latency.p90 dev=+1.6, checkoutservice cpu dev=+2.0. Root cause likely in latency or cpu anomalies.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 30-90s metrics. Recommendationservice latency.p90 dev=+2.6 (60-90s) confirms latency as root cause. Cartservice latency anomalies are propagation effects. Ranking updated to recommendationservice_latency first.
